name: 倒装·强调·核心难句
desc: 否定前置倒装、Only 倒装、so...that 倒装、It is...that 强调句，训练「还原正常语序」。

sentences.cat: 否定副词前置·部分倒装
sentences.en: Not until the government relaxed its restrictions did foreign investors return to the market in large numbers.
sentences.cn: 直到政府放松管制，外国投资者才大批重返市场。

parts.text: Not until the government relaxed its restrictions
to the market in large numbers

sentences.tip: Not until... 这类否定状语置于句首，主句要用部分倒装：助动词 did 提到主语 foreign investors 之前。还原正常语序为 Foreign investors did not return... until the government relaxed...。
sentences.trap: 看到句首 Not until 就要预判主句倒装（did + 主语 + 动词原形）。倒装的是主句，until 引导的时间状语从句本身不倒装。

sentences.en: Only by working together can nations hope to solve problems that no single country is able to tackle alone.
sentences.cn: 唯有携手合作，各国才有望解决任何单一国家都无法独自应对的问题。

parts.note: 情态动词提前（部分倒装）

parts.text: that no single country is able to tackle alone
parts.note: 定语从句，修饰 problems（tackle 后缺宾语）

sentences.tip: Only + 状语（by working together）置于句首，主句部分倒装：情态动词 can 提到主语 nations 之前。problems 后 that... 是修饰它的定语从句。
sentences.trap: Only 修饰句首状语或状语从句时才倒装；若 Only 修饰主语（如 Only nations can...）则不倒装。这里 Only by... 是状语，故倒装。

sentences.en: So rapidly has online shopping expanded that traditional retailers have been forced to rethink how they reach their customers.
sentences.cn: 网上购物扩张得如此之快，以至于传统零售商被迫重新思考如何触达自己的顾客。

parts.text: that traditional retailers have been forced to rethink how they reach their customers

sentences.tip: So + 副词（rapidly）置于句首表强调，主句部分倒装：助动词 has 提到主语 online shopping 之前。so... that... 构成「如此……以至于」的结果关系。
sentences.trap: 句首 So rapidly 触发倒装（has + 主语 + 过去分词）。别忘了后面必有 that 引导结果状语从句，二者呼应。

sentences.en: It is the ability to adapt quickly, rather than sheer size, that determines which firms survive in a volatile market.
sentences.cn: 决定哪些公司能在动荡市场中存活下来的，是快速适应的能力，而非单纯的规模。

parts.note: 强调句结构 It is ... that
被强调的部分（真正的主语）

parts.text: which firms survive in a volatile market

sentences.tip: It is ... that ... 是强调句：去掉 It is 和 that，剩下 The ability to adapt quickly determines... 仍是完整句子，说明这是强调结构。被强调的是主语 the ability to adapt quickly。
sentences.trap: 判断强调句：拿掉 It is...that 后若剩下的仍是完整句子，就是强调句（而非定语从句/主语从句）。这里强调主语；rather than sheer size 是插入的对比成分。
